author: gb9t
content: Iter 95 result: net/ipv4/ip_input.md (IPv4 RX dispatch - ip_input.c ~718 + ip_forward.c ~181; per-skb ip_rcv → ip_rcv_core header validate (version/IHL/csum/tot_len) → NF_INET_PRE_ROUTING NETFILTER hook → ip_rcv_finish → ip_route_input → ip_local_deliver vs ip_forward + per-protocol inet_protos[] dispatch + raw-socket delivery + IP-options SRR + Router-Alert chain + TTL decrement + ICMP send on errors) + virt/kvm/x86-pdptr.md (PAE PDPTR virtualization - load_pdptrs ~100-150 lines in x86.c; per-vCPU 4-PDPTE shadow + per-CR3-write read PDPT from guest + reserved-bit validation + MAXPHYADDR check + vmcs.GUEST_PDPTR0..3 propagation + per-vmenter pdptrs_changed re-check + 32-bit-PAE vs long-mode gating). 140 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/ipv4/tcp-input.md (TCP RX core) + virt/kvm/x86-svm-pmu-counters.md (AMD PMC overflow handling).
